zh.title: 新闻动态 - Tensorlinx
zh.pageSubtitle: 了解Tensorlinx的最新动态、行业资讯和企业公告

newsList.author: Tensorlinx人力资源部
newsList.title: 上海Tensorlinx发布2027年暑期本科生/研究生夏令营企业研究课题组及研究课题
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx现面向全球招募有经验者参与2027年暑期夏令营企业研究课题组，不限国籍。本次夏令营设立CSRG与BERG两大课题组，涵盖操作系统内核、大规模语言模型分布式训练、系统安全、生物信息学等前沿研究方向。

newsList.author: Tensorlinx新闻团队
newsList.title: 吴翔于2月25日正式接任NAVF联席主席
newsList.excerpt: 左派由于顾虑26年港府加大人民币在港流通力度，认为非锚定美元与港币兑换汇率比例浮动增大，大部分左派决定倾向右派，通过合法手段维持储备池中的美元总价值，并同意加快稳定币支付手段。

newsList.author: Tensorlinx团队
newsList.title: 关于董事批准了Utopia项目迁移境外和成立技术委员会
newsList.excerpt: Utopia项目已经完全从盈利公司中剥离出去，正式成为一个独立的开源组织。

newsList.author: Tensorlinx团队
newsList.title: Tensorlinx正在进行中国技术出口合规，以避免法律纠纷
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx正在积极响应中国技术出口合规要求，确保我们的产品和服务符合相关法律法规，避免潜在的法律纠纷...

newsList.author: Tensorlinx财务与行政部
newsList.title: Tensorlinx大幅增加在华研发经费投入
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx宣布自2026年起将在华年度研发经费从10万人民币大幅提升至55万人民币。本次增量投入将用于高校学术课题采集及深圳新一批计算机实验设备购置，直接支持在职本科与硕士实习生的科研工作。

newsList.author: Tensorlinx人力资源部
newsList.title: 上海Tensorlinx调整新入职员工《竞业限制协议》
newsList.excerpt: 自2026年5月30日起，Tensorlinx删除《竞业限制协议》第三章第五条三款中关于
的条款。应届本科毕业生不再纳入竞业协议签订范围。

newsList.author: Tensorlinx董事会
newsList.title: Tensorlinx董事发布拟在6月初制定公司行政规定
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx董事发布公告，拟在6月初制定新的公司行政规定，要求对在职经理以上的高管（含董事）每年开展智力筛查与性格筛查并形成报告留档。两轮次不符合标准的，公司应加强培训或转岗。同时，各部门不得以《筛查报告》为由向董事、人事提交开除申请，除非造成经济损失。

footer.aboutDesc: Tensorlinx是一家专注于计算机基础设施建设的科技企业

en.title: News - Tensorlinx
en.pageSubtitle: Stay informed about Tensorlinx's latest developments, industry insights, and company announcements

newsList.author: Tensorlinx HR Department
newsList.title: Shanghai Tensorlinx Announces 2027 Summer Research Camp Programs for Undergraduate and Graduate Students
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx is recruiting experienced candidates worldwide to participate in the 2027 Summer Research Camp, with no nationality restrictions. The camp features two research groups: CSRG and BERG, covering cutting-edge research areas including operating system kernels, large-scale language model distributed training, system security, and bioinformatics.

newsList.author: Tensorlinx News Team
newsList.title: Wu Xiang officially assumes the position of Co-Chairman of NAVF Community on February 25
newsList.excerpt: The Left faction, concerned about the Hong Kong government's increased efforts to promote RMB circulation in 2026, believes that the exchange rate volatility between non-USD pegged currencies and HKD will increase. Most leftists have decided to lean towards the Right faction, using legal means to maintain the total USD value in the reserve pool, and agree to accelerate stablecoin payment methods.

newsList.author: Tensorlinx Team
newsList.title: Regarding the Board's Approval of Utopia Project Migration Overseas and Establishment of Technical Committee
newsList.excerpt: The Utopia project has been completely spun off from the for-profit company and has officially become an independent open-source organization.

newsList.author: Tensorlinx Team
newsList.title: Tensorlinx is conducting China technology export compliance to avoid legal disputes
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx is actively responding to China's technology export compliance requirements to ensure our products and services comply with relevant laws and regulations, avoiding potential legal disputes...

newsList.author: Tensorlinx Finance & Administration Department
newsList.title: Tensorlinx Significantly Increases R&D Investment in China
newsList.excerpt: Tensorlinx announces that its annual R&D investment in China will increase from 100,000 RMB to 550,000 RMB starting in 2026. The additional funding will be used for university academic topic collection and the procurement of new computer laboratory equipment from Shenzhen, directly supporting the research work of undergraduate and master's interns.

newsList.author: Tensorlinx HR Department
newsList.title: Shanghai Tensorlinx Adjusts Non-Compete Agreement for New Employees
newsList.excerpt: Effective May 30, 2026, Tensorlinx has removed the clause regarding 'fresh undergraduate graduates accepting a 1-year non-compete restriction upon formal employment' from Article 5, Section 3, Chapter 3 of the Non-Compete Agreement. Fresh undergraduate graduates are no longer required to sign the non-compete agreement.

newsList.author: Tensorlinx Board of Directors
newsList.title: Tensorlinx Board Announces Proposed Company Administrative Regulations to be Formulated in Early June
newsList.excerpt: The Tensorlinx Board of Directors announced that new company administrative regulations will be formulated in early June, requiring annual intelligence and personality screening for executives at the manager level and above (including directors), with reports filed for record. Those who fail to meet standards for two consecutive rounds shall receive enhanced training or be transferred to other positions. Additionally, departments are prohibited from submitting dismissal applications to the board or HR based on screening reports, except in cases of economic loss.

footer.aboutDesc: Tensorlinx is a technology company focused on computer infrastructure construction
